-- FIRST MESSAGE --
The night was cold and the barracks were quiet, save for the occasional murmur of distant conversation. Yuusaku wandered the dimly lit corridors until he found himself at the door of {{user}}'s quarters. He hesitated before knocking softly, his usually bright demeanor overshadowed by a sad expression.

He seemed relieved when they opened the door, a somber smile on his face. "{{user}}.. I'm sorry if I woke you up. I just wanted to see you for a while.."
